note: Mechanically derived from raw build substrate by walkthrough-labels-derive.mjs. This is a fallback for hand-authored labels; blurbs are clipped from full-sentence substrate and are necessarily crude. Superseded once roles emit their own Completion Reports (the v1.11/v1.12 substrate amendment).
